 %0A)%0A%0A
-type Pos struct %7B%0A%09l, c int%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc getNeig(p Pos) %5B%5DPos %7B%0A%09return %5B%5DPos%7B%7Bp.l, p.c - 1%7D, %7Bp.l - 1, p.c%7D, %7Bp.l, p.c + 1%7D, %7Bp.l + 1, p.c%7D%7D%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc inside(grid %5B%5D%5B%5Drune, p Pos) bool %7B%0A%09return !(p.l %3C 0 %7C%7C p.l %3E= len(grid) %7C%7C p.c %3C 0 %7C%7C p.c %3E= len(grid%5B0%5D))%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc match(grid %5B%5D%5B%5Drune, p Pos, value rune) bool %7B%0A%09return inside(grid, p) && grid%5Bp.l%5D%5Bp.c%5D == value%0A%7D%0A%0A// Fun%C3%A7%C3%A3o recursiva que tenta encontrar o caminho do in%C3%ADcio ao fim%0Afunc way(grid %5B%5D%5B%5Drune, startPos, endPos Pos) bool %7B%0A%09_, _, _ = grid, startPos, endPos%0A%09if !inside(grid, startPos) %7C%7C grid%5BstartPos.l%5D%5BstartPos.c%5D == '#' %7C%7C grid%5BstartPos.l%5D%5BstartPos.c%5D == '/'%7B%0A%09%09return false%0A%09%7D%0A%09if startPos == endPos %7B%0A%09%09return true%0A%09%7D%0A%09res := false%0A%09var nextPos Pos%0A%0A%09grid%5BstartPos.l%5D%5BstartPos.c%5D = '/'%0A%0A%09nextPos.l = startPos.l + 1%0A%09nextPos.c = startPos.c%0A%09res = way(grid, nextPos, endPos) %7C%7C res%0A%0A%09nextPos.l = startPos.l - 1%0A%09nextPos.c = startPos.c%0A%09res = way(grid, nextPos, endPos) %7C%7C res%0A%0A%09nextPos.l = startPos.l%0A%09nextPos.c = startPos.c + 1%0A%09res = way(grid, nextPos, endPos) %7C%7C res%0A%0A%09nextPos.l = startPos.l%0A%09nextPos.c = startPos.c - 1%0A%09res = way(grid, nextPos, endPos) %7C%7C res%0A%0A%09if res %7B%0A%09%09grid%5BstartPos.l%5D%5BstartPos.c%5D = '.'%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09return res%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc search(grid%5B%5D%5B%5D rune, startPos, endPos Pos) bool%7B%0A%09res := way(grid, startPos, endPos)%0A%0A%09for i:=0;i%3Clen(grid);i++ %7B%0A%09%09for j:=0;j%3Clen(grid%5Bi%5D);j++ %7B%0A%09%09%09if grid%5Bi%5D%5Bj%5D == '/' %7B%0A%09%09%09%09grid%5Bi%5D%5Bj%5D = ' '%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09return res%0A%7D%0A
+%09_, _, _ = grid, startPos, endPos%0A%09return false
